metadata.notFoundDescription: This page could not be found. Return to {brand} — Games, Tech, Context.
metadata.episodesArchiveDescription: Browse every {brand} episode — filter by topic, search the archive, and play in full.

hero.taglineLine1: We unpack games, technology, and the craft in between.

about.label: About the Show
about.p1: {brand} is a podcast for people who build things — and for those curious about what goes into the games and tech they love. We go beyond the surface, beyond the press releases, and into the actual craft.
about.p2: Each episode is an honest conversation between a game designer and a technologist — two different lenses on the same evolving landscape. We argue, we agree, and we always learn something.
about.p3: No fluff. No filler. Just ideas worth your time.

jan.bio: A game designer with nearly twenty years of experience. Jan has worked on games for PCs, consoles, browsers, and mobile devices, but regardless of the platform, he remains fascinated by minimalist design, immersive, enigmatic worlds, and the diverse ways in which players enter them.
jan.specialtyTopics: Game design and development, creative direction, production

martin.bio: Founder and technical architect who builds the infrastructure games run on. He builds teams for the problem at hand and pushes past limits that look impossible at first. From assembly to leading cutting-edge teams, he keeps returning to where engineering meets creativity.
martin.specialtyTopics: Platform architecture, team building, tech strategy

episodesPage.label: Archive
episodesPage.intro: Search the catalog, follow topics, or dig through on-site episode metadata — same show, bigger canvas than the home page list.
episodesPage.emptyHint: Try clearing a topic chip or shortening your search.
episodesPage.emptyHintTopicLocked: Try shortening your search. Browse other topics from the topics index.

continueListening.label: Continue listening
continueListening.body: No episode description in the catalog data.

startHere.label: Start here
startHere.heading: Not sure which episode to play first?
startHere.intro: These are three strong entry points depending on whether you care most about studios, game design, or the technical layer underneath.

founders.title: If you care about studios, money, and survival
founders.body: A grounded episode on what indie game funding looks like now and what that means for small teams.

designers.title: If you want to understand why systems fail
designers.body: Procedural generation without the myths: where the tools outrun design thinking and why players feel it.

builders.title: If you want AI without the fog
builders.body: A practical conversation about AI as a working partner, not a savior and not a villain.

topics.indexIntro: Pick a topic to see every episode that dives into it.
